name: Bran Cereal Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Grease muffin tins.
3. Stir bran cereal and milk together in a bowl. Let stand for about one minute.
4. Add egg, oil, and honey. Beat well.
5. Stir remaining ingredients until well mixed.
6. Add the dry mixture to the liquid mixture and stir only until combined.
7. Put into muffin tins.
8. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until lightly browned.
Calories per muffin: About 135
